_evasion.description: Attacker uses the HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon path instead of the common Run key, or uses the UserInitMprLogonScript value.
_evasion.bypass_attempt: Using Winlogon Userinit or UserInitMprLogonScript for persistence instead of Run key
_evasion.notes: KNOWN GAP. Our T1547.001 rule monitors CurrentVersion\Run and RunOnce. The Winlogon paths (HKLM/HKCU\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon) are valid persistence vectors not currently covered.
_evasion.remediation: Extend t1547_001 rule to include Winlogon registry paths, or create a companion T1547.001 rule for Winlogon persistence
